HGSS.695.0001:
Your knowledge is impressive!
I like that!\f
Want to trade battle tips?
I’ll phone if I get good info.\f
Would you tell me your number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.695.0002: I’ll call you if I hear anything!
HGSS.695.0003:
Oh, OK. Too bad...\f
Well, if you ever want my number,
come and see me, OK?
HGSS.695.0004:
Want to trade battle tips?
I’ll phone if I get good info.\f
Would you tell me your number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.695.0006:
What’s going on?
We’re pretty close... Why not just come\r
and talk in person?
HGSS.695.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s intelligence keeps
rising. It might be smarter than yours!\f
See you later!
HGSS.695.0008:
The other day, I easily defeated a wild
[0100,000B,0000].\f
I think swapping tips with you is
starting to help.\f
See you later!
HGSS.695.0009:
I missed catching a wild [0100,000B,0000] by
just a tiny bit.\f
If I’d been more informed, I’m
sure I would’ve caught it...\f
See you later!
HGSS.695.0010:
Did you know...?\f
When it’s raining, Thunder is sure
to strike.
HGSS.695.0011:
Did you know...?\f
If you use Defense Curl, Rollout’s
power goes way up past normal.
HGSS.695.0012:
Did you know...?\f
If the sunlight is harsh, Solarbeam
doesn’t need to be charged up.
HGSS.695.0013:
Did you know...?\f
If the opponent uses Minimize, your
Stomp becomes more powerful.
HGSS.695.0014:
Did you know...?\f
If your opponent is Flying, your Gust
becomes much more powerful.
HGSS.695.0015:
Did you know...?\f
If your opponent is Flying, your Twister
becomes more powerful.
HGSS.695.0016:
Did you know...?\f
If your opponent uses Dig, your
Earthquake becomes more powerful.
HGSS.695.0017:
Did you know...?\f
If your opponent uses Dig, your
Magnitude becomes more powerful.
HGSS.695.0018:
Did you know...?\f
The Rock, Ground, and Steel types
can’t be hurt by Sandstorm.
HGSS.695.0019:
Did you know...?\f
If the sunlight is harsh, Water-type
moves become much weaker.
HGSS.695.0020:
Did you know...?\f
When it’s raining, Fire-type moves
become much weaker than usual.
HGSS.695.0021:
Do you want to battle? I’ll show you
how to battle logically.\f
I’ll be in [0104,0003,0000].\f
Give me a shout if you’re nearby.
HGSS.695.0022:
Hey, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Do you remember your promise?
We have to battle soon!\f
I’ll be at [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.695.0023:
Hey, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Do you remember your promise?
We have to battle soon!\f
I’ll be at [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.695.0024:
My friend heard some great tips.
He’s going to let me in on some.\f
When he tells me, I’ll call and tell you.
